title: Resolution commending and congratulating Michael Oboza Concio Jr., of Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna for being the Chess Champion standard category during the ?Batang Pinoy National Championship 2019? held on August 25-31 at Puerto Prinsesa, Palawan. (Authors: Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon and Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, 09/13/19)
